text:
```nomad gumdrop/services/gumdrop-ingestion/gumdrop-ingestion.nomad:161-223
      template {
        data        = <<EOH
  LOG_LEVEL                           = "INFO"
  API_BASE_ADDRESS                    = "localhost:8080"
  KAFKA_VERSION                       = "3.2.0"
  Telemetry__HostName                 = "{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:8125"
  GLOBAL_TAGS                         = "[[ .deployment_tag ]]"
  CONSUL_URL                          = "http://{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:[[ .consul_http_port ]]"
  CONSUL_HTTP_ADDR                    = "http://{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:[[ .consul_http_port ]]"
  CONSUL_KV_PATH                      = "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest"
  KAFKA_BATCH_SIZE                    = "[[ .services.ingestion.buffer_size ]]"
  BATCH_PARTITION_COUNT               = "[[ .services.ingestion.batch_partition_count ]]"
  DOCS_PER_BATCH_THRESHOLD            = "[[ .services.ingestion.buffer_doc_threshold ]]"
  REFRESH                             = "false"
  QUEUE_FLUSH_TIMEOUT_IN_MILLISECONDS = "1000"
  OPENSEARCH_MAX_RETRIES              = "3"
  RETRY_BACKOFF                       = "20"
  FLUSH_BYTES                         = "2097152"
  REQUESTS_PER_SECOND                 = "250"
  GOTRACEBACK                         = "system"
  KAFKA_CONNECTION_MAX_RETRY_COUNT    = "15"
  GOLANG_VERSION                      = "1.23"
  NESTING_LIMIT                       = 100
  CASCADE_DELETE_NESTING_LIMIT        = 25
  FAN_OUT_NESTING_LIMIT               = 25
  CLEAN_UP_NESTING_LIMIT              = 25
  MAX_BYTES_PER_REQUEST               = 10485760
  UPDATE_BY_QUERY_SLICES              = "auto"
  STARTUP                             = "ingest"
  TEMP_FOLDER_PATH                    = "/alloc/data"
  INGESTION_PROCESS_ONLY_FAN_OUT      = "false"
  LOGICAL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME             = "[[ .deployment_name | default "" ]]"
  {{ keyOrDefault "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest/environment-variables" "" }}
  {{ with secret "[[ .secrets_path_opensearch ]]" }}
  DATABASE_SERVER                     = {{ printf "%v:%v" .Data.data.address.endpoint .Data.data.address.port | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_PORT                       = {{ .Data.data.address.port | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_USER                       = {{ .Data.data.auth.username | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_PASSWORD                   = {{ .Data.data.auth.password | toJSON }}
  INDEX_PATTERN                       = {{ .Data.data.index_prefix_pattern | toJSON }}
  {{ end }}
  {{ with secret "[[ .secrets_path_kafka ]]" }}
  KAFKA_USERNAME                      = {{ .Data.data.auth.username | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_PASSWORD                      = {{ .Data.data.auth.password | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_AUTH_MECHANISM                = {{ .Data.data.auth.auth_mechanism | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_AUTH_PROTOCOL                 = {{ .Data.data.auth.protocol | toJSON }}
  {{ if .Data.data.auth.use_default_os_ca }}
  KAFKA_CA_CERTIFICATE = "/etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.crt"
  {{ else }}
  KAFKA_CA_CERTIFICATE = "/etc/ssl/certs/kafka_root_ca.pem"
  {{ end }}
  KAFKA_ADDRESS                       = {{ .Data.data.brokers | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_KAFKA_TOPICS              = {{ .Data.data.replication_proxy_event_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_DLQ_KAFKA_TOPIC           = {{ .Data.data.gumdrop_dead_letter_event_dead_letter_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_FAN_OUT_KAFKA_TOPIC       = {{ .Data.data.gumdrop_fan_out_event_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  {{ end }}
EOH
        destination = "local/overrides/.env"
        env         = true
        change_mode = "restart"
        splay       = "30s"
      }

      template {
```

in this template given that we have ingest/environment-variable available. which of these variables can be overridden, and which cannot?
Based on the template provided, I can explain which variables can and cannot be overridden through the Consul KV store at `[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest/environment-variables`.

## Variables that CAN be overridden:
Any variable defined before the `{{ keyOrDefault "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest/environment-variables" "" }}` line can be overridden because the Consul KV values are loaded after these definitions. These include:

- LOG_LEVEL
- API_BASE_ADDRESS
- KAFKA_VERSION
- Telemetry__HostName
- GLOBAL_TAGS
- CONSUL_URL
- CONSUL_HTTP_ADDR
- CONSUL_KV_PATH
- KAFKA_BATCH_SIZE
- BATCH_PARTITION_COUNT
- DOCS_PER_BATCH_THRESHOLD
- REFRESH
- QUEUE_FLUSH_TIMEOUT_IN_MILLISECONDS
- OPENSEARCH_MAX_RETRIES
- RETRY_BACKOFF
- FLUSH_BYTES
- REQUESTS_PER_SECOND
- GOTRACEBACK
- KAFKA_CONNECTION_MAX_RETRY_COUNT
- GOLANG_VERSION
- NESTING_LIMIT
- CASCADE_DELETE_NESTING_LIMIT
- FAN_OUT_NESTING_LIMIT
- CLEAN_UP_NESTING_LIMIT
- MAX_BYTES_PER_REQUEST
- UPDATE_BY_QUERY_SLICES
- STARTUP
- TEMP_FOLDER_PATH
- INGESTION_PROCESS_ONLY_FAN_OUT
- LOGICAL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME

## Variables that CANNOT be overridden:
Variables defined after the `{{ keyOrDefault "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest/environment-variables" "" }}` line will take precedence over anything in the Consul KV store. These include:

- Variables from OpenSearch secrets:
  - DATABASE_SERVER
  - DATABASE_PORT
  - DATABASE_USER
  - DATABASE_PASSWORD
  - INDEX_PATTERN

- Variables from Kafka secrets:
  - KAFKA_USERNAME
  - KAFKA_PASSWORD
  - KAFKA_AUTH_MECHANISM
  - KAFKA_AUTH_PROTOCOL
  - KAFKA_CA_CERTIFICATE
  - KAFKA_ADDRESS
  - INGESTION_KAFKA_TOPICS
  - INGESTION_DLQ_KAFKA_TOPIC
  - INGESTION_FAN_OUT_KAFKA_TOPIC

This is because these variables are set after the Consul KV values are loaded, and would therefore overwrite any values provided through the KV store.
I want all of them to be possible to override.
I understand you want all environment variables to be configurable through Consul KV. Currently, the template loads secrets data after the Consul KV values, which means the secret-derived values can't be overridden.

Here's how you could modify the template to allow all variables to be overridable:

```nomad
template {
  data = <<EOH
  # Set default values first
  LOG_LEVEL                           = "INFO"
  API_BASE_ADDRESS                    = "localhost:8080"
  KAFKA_VERSION                       = "3.2.0"
  Telemetry__HostName                 = "{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:8125"
  GLOBAL_TAGS                         = "[[ .deployment_tag ]]"
  CONSUL_URL                          = "http://{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:[[ .consul_http_port ]]"
  CONSUL_HTTP_ADDR                    = "http://{{ env "attr.unique.network.ip-address" }}:[[ .consul_http_port ]]"
  CONSUL_KV_PATH                      = "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest"
  KAFKA_BATCH_SIZE                    = "[[ .services.ingestion.buffer_size ]]"
  BATCH_PARTITION_COUNT               = "[[ .services.ingestion.batch_partition_count ]]"
  DOCS_PER_BATCH_THRESHOLD            = "[[ .services.ingestion.buffer_doc_threshold ]]"
  REFRESH                             = "false"
  QUEUE_FLUSH_TIMEOUT_IN_MILLISECONDS = "1000"
  OPENSEARCH_MAX_RETRIES              = "3"
  RETRY_BACKOFF                       = "20"
  FLUSH_BYTES                         = "2097152"
  REQUESTS_PER_SECOND                 = "250"
  GOTRACEBACK                         = "system"
  KAFKA_CONNECTION_MAX_RETRY_COUNT    = "15"
  GOLANG_VERSION                      = "1.23"
  NESTING_LIMIT                       = 100
  CASCADE_DELETE_NESTING_LIMIT        = 25
  FAN_OUT_NESTING_LIMIT               = 25
  CLEAN_UP_NESTING_LIMIT              = 25
  MAX_BYTES_PER_REQUEST               = 10485760
  UPDATE_BY_QUERY_SLICES              = "auto"
  STARTUP                             = "ingest"
  TEMP_FOLDER_PATH                    = "/alloc/data"
  INGESTION_PROCESS_ONLY_FAN_OUT      = "false"
  LOGICAL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME             = "[[ .deployment_name | default "" ]]"
  
  # Set default OpenSearch and Kafka values from secrets
  {{ with secret "[[ .secrets_path_opensearch ]]" }}
  DATABASE_SERVER                     = {{ printf "%v:%v" .Data.data.address.endpoint .Data.data.address.port | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_PORT                       = {{ .Data.data.address.port | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_USER                       = {{ .Data.data.auth.username | toJSON }}
  DATABASE_PASSWORD                   = {{ .Data.data.auth.password | toJSON }}
  INDEX_PATTERN                       = {{ .Data.data.index_prefix_pattern | toJSON }}
  {{ end }}
  
  {{ with secret "[[ .secrets_path_kafka ]]" }}
  KAFKA_USERNAME                      = {{ .Data.data.auth.username | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_PASSWORD                      = {{ .Data.data.auth.password | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_AUTH_MECHANISM                = {{ .Data.data.auth.auth_mechanism | toJSON }}
  KAFKA_AUTH_PROTOCOL                 = {{ .Data.data.auth.protocol | toJSON }}
  {{ if .Data.data.auth.use_default_os_ca }}
  KAFKA_CA_CERTIFICATE                = "/etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.crt"
  {{ else }}
  KAFKA_CA_CERTIFICATE                = "/etc/ssl/certs/kafka_root_ca.pem"
  {{ end }}
  KAFKA_ADDRESS                       = {{ .Data.data.brokers | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_KAFKA_TOPICS              = {{ .Data.data.replication_proxy_event_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_DLQ_KAFKA_TOPIC           = {{ .Data.data.gumdrop_dead_letter_event_dead_letter_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  INGESTION_FAN_OUT_KAFKA_TOPIC       = {{ .Data.data.gumdrop_fan_out_event_producer.topic_name | toJSON }}
  {{ end }}
  
  # Finally load Consul KV overrides AFTER setting defaults
  # This allows any variable to be overridden
  {{ keyOrDefault "[[ .kv_path ]]/ingest/environment-variables" "" }}
EOH
  destination = "local/overrides/.env"
  env         = true
  change_mode = "restart"
  splay       = "30s"
}
```

By moving the `keyOrDefault` directive to the end of the template, any environment variable specified in the Consul KV store will take precedence over the default values, including those sourced from secrets.

This approach gives you:
1. Default values for all variables
2. Secret values as fallbacks for sensitive information
3. The ability to override ANY variable through Consul KV

This way, you maintain security (secrets are used by default) while gaining complete flexibility to override any variable when needed.
